2xs.$description: Radius 2xs. Minimal rounding for very small elements (default focus rings, small boxes).

xs.$description: Radius xs. Small rounding for compact UI elements (menu items, code spans), or for elements where relative size shouldn't be assumed (images).

sm.$description: Radius sm. Moderate rounding for medium-scale UI surfaces.

md.$description: Radius md. Default rounding for standard UI surfaces (alerts, code blocks). Pick t-shirt sizes when the element's shortest side is unknown — match the size to the component's relative scale.

lg.$description: Radius lg. Pronounced rounding for large surfaces (cards, panels).

default.$description: Default radius ratio. Multiplier for computing radius from a known element dimension (e.g. shortest side × ratio). Prefer ratio-based calculation over t-shirt sizes when the element's shortest side is known.

lg.$description: Large radius ratio. For more pronounced proportional rounding.
